dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [It has been determined that this case merits preservation as a record. The following is the case record pertaining to today's request.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content:
[Case Name: Thousand Needles.]
[Serial Code: Dn-00113.]
[Grade: Urban Legend.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [The case has now developed to a point where assigning codes beginning with "A-" to the victims no longer serves any practical purpose.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: ["Catastrophic propagation via a series of random chain reactions" would be an appropriate description for the nature of this case. As such, it would be both inefficient and impossible to assign individual serial codes to every victim scattered throughout this street.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [The circumstances surrounding the case align with both the information gathered from rumors and the case report compiled by Representative Gregor of the Dawn Office.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Now briefly recording the state of the case scene.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Sections of the building have been liquefied...]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [And beneath the damaged structure, traces in the form of human remains can be observed.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Many of the victims' remains are no more than distal extremities of the human body.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [By contrast, it is rare to find torsos and internal organs that maintain even a moderate resemblance to their original forms. Given this fact, it is reasonable to infer that the prevailing cause of death in this case is something of an explosive nature.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Remaining bits and pieces of human flesh also indicate that the said explosion was accompanied by countless shrapnel tearing the bodies inside-out.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Faust determines that all of these observations indeed point to a single property: omnidirectional fragmentation of this pitch-black matter from within the body...]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [A presentation identical to that of prior cases.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Hm. The matter is abnormally dense compared to its mass. Its material strength is also unnaturally high—merely touching the surface of the wall permits the matter to drill through it with negligible resistance.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [... Immediately after making contact, the matter begins to melt an area several times larger than the point of contact. It is difficult to believe that such a material could have been produced by the human body.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [It is certain that this matter is identical to the one currently under Faust's investigation as an object of interest—designated as "needles."]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [... Yes, that is correct. Symbols of an irregular, atypical pattern, which Faust had repeatedly received on-site verification requests for, are present on the material.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Now cross-referencing this observation against Faust's information.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [... No matching information found. In that case, the minority hypothesis, which alleges that the symbol points to a "malicious advertisement attempt by a certain upstart Workshop," may be dismissed as false.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Now moving on to the next proposed hypothesis. "Yesterday's Promise and Demonic Magic"... Has the presently recorded case's scene yielded any verifiable fact that substantiates the said hypothesis?]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [... Understood. Faust recalls having stored a piece of information regarding the body of a corporate employee found in the Backstreets—a victim of the so-called "gut-harvesting." The corpse also bore a much similar symbol.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [... Gut-harvesting refers to the criminal act of the Backstreets Syndicates by which corpses are stripped of anything considered to have monetary value. Fausts who limit themselves to observing Nest-sourced information may have been unsuitable participants in the discussion of this particular subject.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [It strains the realm of believability... But if such an incomprehensible phenomenon does indeed exist, perhaps this would be one of the ways by which it is manifested.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: ["Balloons popping"... would be the closest approximation. The radius of the damage is far too great for such a seemingly weightless impact force.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Does the entity designated as "Yesterday's Promise"... truly employ a power that may be termed as "magic"?]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Perhaps access to some more pieces of information... would help Faust thread together the truth of the matter...]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [... Yes, of course. Faust is aware that access to any information beyond this point is prohibited.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [However, it is an established fact that the entity's ability concerns "contracts"... In which case, working as a Fixer should bring Faust closer to an answer.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Understood. Then the discussion regarding this record will conclude here. Faust will need to head to the Office and submit a report.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Sinclair said he had something he wished to say to Faust once this was over... However, it appears Faust will not be able to hear it.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [And it seems probable...]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [It seems probable that this will be Faust's final record.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Current location: The "Library," as per the popular denomination.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Correct. This is the same place that has recently been reclassified as an Urban Plague.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Faust confirms that writing one's name on the invitation alone is sufficient to transport the invitee to this place. This record is best shared with the other Fausts in advance...]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Ah.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Access rights received. Faust cannot help but notice that access is granted to Faust... when it is already too late.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Would that mean—no, please disregard that.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Concentrating on the battle at hand would be the more rational choice.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Yes. The opponents seem determined to make Faust their initial target. It is unlikely that Faust will be able to fend off the entirety of their focused offense.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [They are healing themselves merely by grabbing pebbles in their hands.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [And Faust hears... the incomprehensible ringing of a cry, a song, or perhaps just an echo... The mind feels as though it were shaking and staggering just by hearing the sound...]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Is this an attack launched by utilizing the properties of Abnormalities? If so, what could this place possibly be...?]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Though I find this development disappointing... I should think of this as a fortunate outcome that has availed me the opportunity to leave an account, at the very least.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Because even should this Faust fail here... The grand objective of Faust must be preserved at all costs.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [Faust only has one wish—to know all of the City.]

dataList.title: Dawn Office Fixer
dataList.content: [... Ending record.]
